messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- A: growth archetype
- ABBV: growth archetype
- ADBE: growth archetype
- AKAM: growth archetype
- ALGN: growth archetype
- ALL: growth archetype
- ALLE: growth archetype
- AMCR: growth archetype
- AMD: growth archetype
- ARE: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: US Jobs Data: Is the AI Building Boom Stronger Than Recession Risk? - tastylive
    Summary: US Jobs Data: Is the AI Building Boom Stronger Than Recession Risk? tastylive

[1] Title: Rootstock Software Launches ERP Solution for Mid-Market Manufacturers and Distributors - Supply & Demand Chain Executive
    Summary: Rootstock Software Launches ERP Solution for Mid-Market Manufacturers and Distributors Supply & Demand Chain Executive

[2] Title: Why distributor stocks face a double squeeze on margins - Investors' Chronicle
    Summary: Why distributor stocks face a double squeeze on margins Investors' Chronicle

[3] Title: Brown-Forman reshuffles distributors in 11 state-run liquor markets - Stock Titan
    Summary: Brown-Forman reshuffles distributors in 11 state-run liquor markets Stock Titan

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "This is general macro commentary on US jobs and recession risk with no specific ticker mentions or direct connection to growth archetype positions."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Product launch announcement for Rootstock Software with no connection to any held tickers (A, ABBV, ADBE, AKAM, ALGN, ALL, ALLE, AMCR, AMD, ARE)."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Generic sector commentary on distributor margins with no specific tickers mentioned and no relevance to growth archetype holdings."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 3,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Brown-Forman distributor reshuffling announcement with no connection to any of the held positions."
  }
]
```
